data.body: PLAN v3 APPROVED by opus re-review (all blockers C1/I2/I1 + minors resolved, verified against code; verdict APPROVE, ready to implement). Implementing in two passes: (1) core acli-subprocess hardening + retry_on_timeout plumbing + unit tests; (2) link write-safety (pre-create get_issue_links check) + rolled-in link tests (C1/C2/I1/minor).
